evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: ## Social Income is a radically simple solution in the fight against poverty. The global open-source initiative converts donations into an unconditional basic income, which is sent directly to the mobile phones of people living in poverty in the Global South.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: ``` / ├─ recipients_app/ → Mobile app for recipients ├─ recipients_selection/ → Verifiable draw process for selecting recipients ├─ seed/ → Firebase emulator seed data ├─ ui/ → Legacy Storybook component library └─ website/ → Next.js (public site, portal, dashboard, infra, backend services) ```

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: - Raw recipient lists → salted → hashed → committed to `/lists` - GitHub Action triggers `draw.sh` - Draw randomness comes from **drand** → https://drand.love - Results written to `/draws` - Draws are reproducible using **dchoose** → https://github.com/drand/dchoose - Full transparency explanation: https://socialincome.org/transparency/recipient-selection

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: The long‑term plan is to phase this out and maintain all components inside `/website`.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: - Currently partly hardcoded - Migration underway → **Storyblok CMS** - Journal already uses Storyblok Docs: https://www.storyblok.com/docs
